HTML file displaying "Hello World!" in a header.

# Purpose
The content is an HTML header element that displays the text "Hello World!" at the first level of heading. The `<h1>` tag is used to define the most important heading in an HTML document, and it is typically rendered in a larger and bolder font than other text.
